description: This file defines a Java entity class 'MfaChallenge' used for handling MFA one-time-password challenges, including persistence mappings and related fields.

classes.name: MfaChallenge
classes.description: Entity class representing an MFA challenge with fields for challenge ID, user reference, OTP hash, expiration, consumption timestamp, and creation time.

methods.name: MfaChallenge
methods.description: Default constructor for the MfaChallenge class.
